description: Snuggle baby up in Baby Towns plush fleece dressing gown available in sizes 0-12 Months your baby will feel safe and secure in these gowns. The lovely star and moon embrodered patch features the saying "dream big little one". As well as this the gowns hood has a super cute pair of 3D ears on the hood! Made from a beautifully soft plush fleece these dressing gowns are lovely soft on your baby's delicate skin!. Pop over baby's favourite pair of pyjamas as the weather gets colder and snuggle up on an evening together for cuddles, what could be better! ?Size Guide ?0-6 Months: Chest - 64cm / Length- 41.5cm ?6-12 Months: Chest - 66cm / Length- 46.5cm
